background: A 18-month guarantee is given based on the assumption that no more than 5% of new cars will be returned. The time to failure T of a car has a constant failure rate.

task.query: What is the maximum failure rate that can be tolerated?
Determine the probability that a new car will fail within three years assuming that the car was functioning at 18 months.

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
